clean_body: Peter, A few days ago, I reached out to tell you about Governor DeSantis’ political ploy to wait until election season to suspend the gas tax. But, when gas prices go up, some politicians will take a different tactic. They’ll say we should increase oil drilling in Florida, even if it’s close to our beaches. And let me be clear — unlike some of my fellow Democrats, I will NEVER say that. [] I’m the ONLY leading Democrat running for governor who never has and never will push for increased oil drilling in Florida. So, if you stand against increased oil drilling, I hope you’ll chip in $20 to support my campaign today. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. Express Donate $10 [] Express Donate $20 [] Express Donate $50 [] Express Donate $100 [] Express Donate $250 [] Another Amount [] I understand the bigger picture here, Peter. I understand that increased drilling puts our state at risk and causes far more problems than it solves. And as your next Governor, I will always push for alternative solutions (like suspending the gas tax) that ease the burden on Florida families without threatening our environment, increasing pollution, and jeopardizing our safety. NO other leading Democrat in this race can say the same. And that’s why I need your help. Help me win this race and protect our state from the dangers of oil drilling by chipping in $20 right now. [] Thank you for your support. — Nikki Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Friend,

Gov. DeSantis claims “Florida is a free state, and we intend to keep it that way.”

But with DeSantis in the governor’s office, **_Florida isn’t free_** ...

Not when DeSantis is attacking a woman’s right to choose, suppressing voting rights, keeping marijuana illegal for adults, stripping workers of their rights — even bullying Florida’s children when they don’t fall in line with his political agenda.
_Under Gov. DeSantis’s leadership, Florida isn’t free. It’s failing._
And if we hand him another four years, he’ll keep on failing Florida: again and again and again. **_[Will you consider making a donation to my campaign to defeat DeSantis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42919334/334893791/1828375930?refcode=20220313_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDFkN2RhMy1kZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYkSt4-VOPIo2hFfk9j08RUsZMdj4sgWId-40bxJC-8=)_**

name: Randolph Bracy
subject: Let’s celebrate Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

Every year, Women’s History Month is a time to reflect on everything women have done to change our society for the better — on the centuries of hard work, activism, and steadfast leadership that they put in to create a better, more equal future for women and girls everywhere.

But, this month also reminds us that the fight for women’s rights is far from over.

Women’s rights are still under attack, Peter, and now more than ever, we need to stand together and make our voices heard in the fight for women’s equality. So, this Women’s History Month, I’m asking you to stand with me and add your name to support women’s rights. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8FlgIJC7hUqZMf75sR48Aw2]

The GOP has made no secret of their disdain for women and women’s rights. For years, they’ve pushed an agenda attacking women’s right to choose, reinforcing gender inequality, and hurting working families.

I’m ready to fight back — to stand up for women’s rights as your next Congressman. And I hope you’ll stand with me. If you’re all in on the fight for women’s rights, click here to add your name today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8FlgIJC7hUqZMf75sR48Aw2]

Thank you for your support.

— Randolph Bracy

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=304whm]

Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

name: Maggie Hassan HQ
subject: The only way we can defend the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We've set an urgent mid-month goal
| | |
---
**It's as simple as this: The only way Senator Maggie Hassan can keep New Hampshire blue and defend the razor-thin Democratic Senate majority is with support from grassroots donors like you.**
The reality is that, unlike her GOP opponents, Maggie doesn't have bottomless pockets of dark money donors. That means the future of Maggie's race — and the Senate majority — all comes down to people like you giving what you can when it matters most.
**That's why we've set an urgent mid-month goal of $35,000 to protect Maggie's seat, which _CNN_ is calling one of the most likely to flip.**
**With polling showing Senator Hassan statistically TIED with her Republican opponent, this is just too important to ignore:** The ONLY way to defend the Senate — and all our hard-fought progress — is with YOUR donation today.

clean_body: We've set an urgent mid-month goal | | | It's as simple as this: The only way Senator Maggie Hassan can keep New Hampshire blue and defend the razor-thin Democratic Senate majority is with support from grassroots donors like you. The reality is that, unlike her GOP opponents, Maggie doesn't have bottomless pockets of dark money donors. That means the future of Maggie's race — and the Senate majority — all comes down to people like you giving what you can when it matters most. That's why we've set an urgent mid-month goal of $35,000 to protect Maggie's seat, which CNN is calling one of the most likely to flip. With polling showing Senator Hassan statistically TIED with her Republican opponent, this is just too important to ignore: The ONLY way to defend the Senate — and all our hard-fought progress — is with YOUR donation today. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for doing your part to defend the Senate majority right now. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: what my grandfather taught me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42924845/334910620/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk724-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTYzZWE2OC1lN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p0MfZtOEFYLRnaT46zS19ANIGXdk4Bh34cleA1lQvYc=)
Peter – the most important lesson I ever learned about politics came from my grandfather, who served as a lieutenant in the Dubuque Fire Department.
Fighting fires and serving in public office are two pretty different life paths, but my grandfather taught me a lesson that is true for both.**At the end of the day, doing good by the people you serve always comes down to this: show up, help people and do your job.**
During my time in the Iowa Legislature and in Congress, I did everything I could to help Iowans and do the job they sent me to Washington to do. Within two weeks of being sworn into office, I became the youngest woman to pass a bill through the U.S. House with my legislation to help small businesses – all during a government shutdown.
I spent the rest of my time in Congress pushing for bills to help families back home in Iowa, working across the aisle and doing the hard work it takes to overcome the gridlock in Washington.
**Now, I'm running for U.S. Senate because ****Iowans deserve a leader who knows that service means you show up, you help people and you do your job.**
You see, Sen. Grassley has spent 47 years in Washington _failing_ to do his job, _failing_ to show up for us when it counts and _failing_ to help the people who elected him. He has let Iowans down time and time again – on affordable healthcare, protections for unions and so much more.
It's no wonder that Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings, and experts are warning that he's got a "tough race" ahead of him. **We have a real chance to win here, but the GOP is already raising millions to defeat challengers like me. I need you to have my back on this one.**
**[That's why I have to ask: please, can you donate $5 right now so that we can defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and elect a real leader for Iowa?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42924846/334910621/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk724-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTYzZWE2OC1lN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p0MfZtOEFYLRnaT46zS19ANIGXdk4Bh34cleA1lQvYc=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42924847/334910622/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk724-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTYzZWE2OC1lN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p0MfZtOEFYLRnaT46zS19ANIGXdk4Bh34cleA1lQvYc=)
---
Thank you,

Abby

Hunt For Congress,
clean_body: Peter, When I was in the military, the skin color of my fellow service members was the last thing on my mind. We needed to work together to defeat our enemies and keep America safe. If we doubted each other over race, we would’ve never been able to get the job done. But even in times of crisis, radical Democrats want to turn us against each other because of the color of our skin. Our President even made race the chief qualifier for choosing a nominee for the Supreme Court. I n America, the color of your skin should NEVER matter when you’re applying for a job, whether it’s for stocking shelves at a local business or for the highest court in the land. I’m running for Congress to stop the socialist Left’s return to segregation, but I need your help. Peter, as a black man in America, the Democrats want me to feel oppressed and under attack. Even worse, they want my daughter to think that she needs the government’s help to achieve her dreams. As a West Point graduate, a father, and a proud conservative, I know that’s not true. Democrats’ race madness is bringing America backward, and for our children’s future, we need to act now before it’s too late. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Meeting goals like this one is critical to helping us stay on track to take on Mike DeWine and his deep-pocketed friends. Nan – unlike every other candidate in this race – isn’t a millionaire. We can’t compete with Mike’s own bank account on our own.

name: John
subject: My Uncle Hal once told me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
and it has stuck with me and has become a lens through which I see everything

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42925454/334914437/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220313-b2_pet_nd-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220313-b2_pet_nd-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220313&&&&utm_content=b2_pet_nd&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=321356b0-eda2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEzNTZiMC1lZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKX4wmuxNc9vd4LmuNQEQfLsGH6gm6ru-elX1zH7cFQ=)
---
| **“Neither you nor I can control the things that happened to you as a child, but you are responsible for the shape of your life going forward.”** After my parents passed away, and I got kicked out of high school, I went to live with my Uncle Hal. At a time in my life when I felt lost and confused, he not only gave me structure and stability, but his words gave me the push I needed to take ownership of my life and they have become a lens through which I see everything. After my mother passed when I was 8 and my father when I was 12, I bounced around between different family members, and eventually was taken in by my Uncle Haldane King. Uncle Hal was a former Tuskegee Airman - one of the first African-American pilots to serve in the U.S. military -and his bravery and determination inspire me to this day. Last week, the Maryland General Assembly began discussions to create a day of recognition in honor of the Tuskegee Airmen. I fully support this effort in honor of Uncle Hal and those who served – [if you do too, will you sign the petition to urge Maryland legislators to make it a reality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42925455/334914438/1107320167?contactdata=o5zPNlVh%2BfyCqEPq27jc3BwqHIwX0a%2FVV8hOecUgpecL4MDiCRkOCg7ScOWX9VsxlHBslo1RQknUZ1NrfaplwJNgWGKVPEtor%2Fp18SgvAJQzhC3iI3mzaLwKu0l4rXbiS%2FnQUn%2BiXj10H3u5C7V4fHN%2FG%2FN2sLpzYi6ItWOjpV4VLLXPTSeq191WvJF%2FDR5OkbLrM%2BLxg5HdVglVj0lm0g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEzNTZiMC1lZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKX4wmuxNc9vd4LmuNQEQfLsGH6gm6ru-elX1zH7cFQ=&emci=6d6843ac-eca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=321356b0-eda2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635484) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42925456/334914439/1107320167?contactdata=o5zPNlVh%2BfyCqEPq27jc3BwqHIwX0a%2FVV8hOecUgpecL4MDiCRkOCg7ScOWX9VsxlHBslo1RQknUZ1NrfaplwJNgWGKVPEtor%2Fp18SgvAJQzhC3iI3mzaLwKu0l4rXbiS%2FnQUn%2BiXj10H3u5C7V4fHN%2FG%2FN2sLpzYi6ItWOjpV4VLLXPTSeq191WvJF%2FDR5OkbLrM%2BLxg5HdVglVj0lm0g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEzNTZiMC1lZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKX4wmuxNc9vd4LmuNQEQfLsGH6gm6ru-elX1zH7cFQ=&emci=6d6843ac-eca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=321356b0-eda2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)
---
At a time when the color of his skin was met with segregation and the denial of civil rights, Uncle Hal risked his life to protect our country because he fundamentally believed in the promise of equality of opportunity. **His commitment to fighting for equity and his fierce belief in America’s fundamental promise, despite the challenges of intense racial discrimination, has stayed with me and inspires me as we work to build a more equitable Maryland. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42925457/334914440/1107320167?contactdata=o5zPNlVh%2BfyCqEPq27jc3BwqHIwX0a%2FVV8hOecUgpecL4MDiCRkOCg7ScOWX9VsxlHBslo1RQknUZ1NrfaplwJNgWGKVPEtor%2Fp18SgvAJQzhC3iI3mzaLwKu0l4rXbiS%2FnQUn%2BiXj10H3u5C7V4fHN%2FG%2FN2sLpzYi6ItWOjpV4VLLXPTSeq191WvJF%2FDR5OkbLrM%2BLxg5HdVglVj0lm0g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEzNTZiMC1lZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKX4wmuxNc9vd4LmuNQEQfLsGH6gm6ru-elX1zH7cFQ=&emci=6d6843ac-eca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=321356b0-eda2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)
Can you help honor his memory and the memory of so many other courageous Tuskegee Airmen by signing our petition today?
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42925458/334914441/1107320167?contactdata=o5zPNlVh%2BfyCqEPq27jc3BwqHIwX0a%2FVV8hOecUgpecL4MDiCRkOCg7ScOWX9VsxlHBslo1RQknUZ1NrfaplwJNgWGKVPEtor%2Fp18SgvAJQzhC3iI3mzaLwKu0l4rXbiS%2FnQUn%2BiXj10H3u5C7V4fHN%2FG%2FN2sLpzYi6ItWOjpV4VLLXPTSeq191WvJF%2FDR5OkbLrM%2BLxg5HdVglVj0lm0g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEzNTZiMC1lZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKX4wmuxNc9vd4LmuNQEQfLsGH6gm6ru-elX1zH7cFQ=&emci=6d6843ac-eca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=321356b0-eda2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)

clean_body: and it has stuck with me and has become a lens through which I see everything | = | “Neither you nor I can control the things that happened to you as a child, but you are responsible for the shape of your life going forward.” After my parents passed away, and I got kicked out of high school, I went to live with my Uncle Hal. At a time in my life when I felt lost and confused, he not only gave me structure and stability, but his words gave me the push I needed to take ownership of my life and they have become a lens through which I see everything. After my mother passed when I was 8 and my father when I was 12, I bounced around between different family members, and eventually was taken in by my Uncle Haldane King. Uncle Hal was a former Tuskegee Airman - one of the first African-American pilots to serve in the U.S. military -and his bravery and determination inspire me to this day. Last week, the Maryland General Assembly began discussions to create a day of recognition in honor of the Tuskegee Airmen. I fully support this effort in honor of Uncle Hal and those who served – | | At a time when the color of his skin was met with segregation and the denial of civil rights, Uncle Hal risked his life to protect our country because he fundamentally believed in the promise of equality of opportunity. His commitment to fighting for equity and his fierce belief in America’s fundamental promise, despite the challenges of intense racial discrimination, has stayed with me and inspires me as we work to build a more equitable Maryland. Can you help honor his memory and the memory of so many other courageous Tuskegee Airmen by signing our petition today? | Thank you, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = &&&&recurring=true&refcode2=321356b0-eda2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEzNTZiMC1lZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKX4wmuxNc9vd4LmuNQEQfLsGH6gm6ru-elX1zH7cFQ= If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . Over the last few days, our online fundraising has taken a drastic dip. That's not what we want to see as we continue to build the infrastructure we need to flip Ohio blue in 2022. If we want a fighting chance to win Ohio's open Senate seat, take back the governor's office, and elect Democrats up and down the ticket, we have to turn this around -- especially with our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year approaching at the end of the month.

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Facebook is targeting us
body:
If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2f7om5ovko4ic8epe0jhao27jrfhmqgjdccot5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie0o74cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sljedp6cc9m63ijep76cdp6edbnmtj7asb4mppm1o76mpi6ed71e8on6dhl6tg6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3ephgmiqj0ptnc5j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqugk4s09riigi5fet7v9n8rt2oqc1ekn58reico_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie0o74cth2bs) | |
---
Friend,

If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them.

But if you’re familiar with our work, you may have noticed that our posts aren't showing up in your Facebook newsfeed anymore.

**That's because Facebook is suppressing our content.**

Take a look at this chart showing engagement with our posts over the past year:
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoc3hslueuaccp0d67mks3af5gqtrkkgqof3sq4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie0o74cth2bs)
Despite our growing audience—we have many more followers now than we did a year ago—we're seeing a drastic, steady decline in reach and engagement. It used to be that 80% of our site's traffic came from Facebook. Now, it's down to just 30%. Babylon Bee articles posted to Facebook used to go viral, generating hundreds of thousands of shares. But that just doesn't happen anymore. Facebook doesn't allow it.

In some cases, our posts aren't merely limited in reach — they're completely suppressed. Here's an example of a recent post that Facebook prevented from being seen by anyone:
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z37m5g38j8qrogragva7t5280mc3gaevkbo76cr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie0o74cth2bs)
We'd have reached more people if we'd printed the article and posted it on a single telephone pole in a small town.

Facebook has assigned a representative to our account. He's supposed to communicate with us and help us resolve problems. But when we ask him directly if Facebook is limiting our page's reach, or suppressing shares of our articles, he refuses to answer me. He literally doesn't respond. He'll respond to other questions, but not that one.

The silence speaks volumes.

So what can be done about this? For now, there's not much that can be done. Facebook is a private company. While they shouldn't be allowed to engage in politically motivated viewpoint discrimination and still enjoy the benefits of Section 230 immunity, there's nothing under the law that currently prevents them from doing just that. This needs to change.

But in the meantime, all we can do is ask for direct support from free-thinking friends like you.

[**As someone who values free speech, I’m asking you to consider becoming a subscriber to the Babylon Bee today. By becoming a subscriber, you reduce our dependence on Big Tech and ensure we'll continue to have a presence and a platform, whether Facebook likes it or not.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0fvmfdrgmnvpbq2nb2oubf4004gv2os3ui2ioj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie0o74cth2bs)
[**Subscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbfp8p5ammlggldbnhvbjcpon2hemnu1p8cribqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie0o74cth2bs)
Plus, if you become a premium subscriber, you’ll get a beautiful coffee table book chock-full of our greatest articles, preserved for posterity. Let’s see Facebook try to censor that!

Thank you for standing with us against the tyranny of Big Tech. We don't need Facebook if we've got you in our corner.

Seth Dillon
CEO
|

clean_body: If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had | | Friend, If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them. But if you’re familiar with our work, you may have noticed that our posts aren't showing up in your Facebook newsfeed anymore. That's because Facebook is suppressing our content. Take a look at this chart showing engagement with our posts over the past year: Despite our growing audience—we have many more followers now than we did a year ago—we're seeing a drastic, steady decline in reach and engagement. It used to be that 80% of our site's traffic came from Facebook. Now, it's down to just 30%. Babylon Bee articles posted to Facebook used to go viral, generating hundreds of thousands of shares. But that just doesn't happen anymore. Facebook doesn't allow it. In some cases, our posts aren't merely limited in reach — they're completely suppressed. Here's an example of a recent post that Facebook prevented from being seen by anyone: We'd have reached more people if we'd printed the article and posted it on a single telephone pole in a small town. Facebook has assigned a representative to our account. He's supposed to communicate with us and help us resolve problems. But when we ask him directly if Facebook is limiting our page's reach, or suppressing shares of our articles, he refuses to answer me. He literally doesn't respond. He'll respond to other questions, but not that one. The silence speaks volumes. So what can be done about this? For now, there's not much that can be done. Facebook is a private company. While they shouldn't be allowed to engage in politically motivated viewpoint discrimination and still enjoy the benefits of Section 230 immunity, there's nothing under the law that currently prevents them from doing just that. This needs to change. But in the meantime, all we can do is ask for direct support from free-thinking friends like you. Plus, if you become a premium subscriber, you’ll get a beautiful coffee table book chock-full of our greatest articles, preserved for posterity. Let’s see Facebook try to censor that! Thank you for standing with us against the tyranny of Big Tech. We don't need Facebook if we've got you in our corner. Seth Dillon CEO | Copyright © 2020 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. SC voters are fed up, and they know that Mia's bold vision for our state resonates with voters. clean_body: Yesterday, disgraced former president Donald Trump visited Florence to spew his hateful, divisive rhetoric. | | Friend - Yesterday, disgraced former president Donald Trump visited Florence to spew his hateful, divisive rhetoric. And who was there to join him? None other than his right-hand man in South Carolina, Governor McMaster. | McMaster welcomed Trump with open arms, embracing his conspiracy theories and echoing his divisive, harmful rhetoric, making it clear that his loyalties lie with Donald Trump, not the hard-working people of South Carolina. It just goes to show you what his strategy is: pledge loyalty to the former president -- even if it means destroying our state. For too long, we've seen what Trump and McMaster's leadership has to offer: vengeful, regressive policies that stuff the pockets of the mega-wealthy and strip South Carolinians of their ability to thrive. SC voters are fed up, and they know that Mia's bold vision for our state resonates with voters. That's why Trump came here yesterday- to rally McMaster's base for his re-election efforts. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for everything you do to support this movement, Team Mia About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. name: Team NPP
subject: We have a question for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
Listening to the needs and concerns of others is how we'll chart our course for recovery. Will you stand up for voting rights?

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42914046/334873268/-636935733?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNGNiNjg4LWQyYTItZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fex61wV_uot7DXh4TRvdf4kP-3tDPQS6PEQZEHs2DYs=&emci=f3b3a49d-e625-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=fa4cb688-d2a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1522179)
Fellow activist, we have been facing appalling attacks on our voting rights as part of a coordinated national effort to methodically strip away access to the ballot box and make it harder for people to register to vote by putting as many barriers in their way as possible once they are registered.
We __must__ continue the critical work of scaling out the New Pennsylvania Project’s voter registration and engagement efforts so we meet the voters WHERE THEY ARE.
**[Will you sign our petition now? clean_body: Listening to the needs and concerns of others is how we'll chart our course for recovery. Will you stand up for voting rights? Fellow activist, we have been facing appalling attacks on our voting rights as part of a coordinated national effort to methodically strip away access to the ballot box and make it harder for people to register to vote by putting as many barriers in their way as possible once they are registered. We must continue the critical work of scaling out the New Pennsylvania Project’s voter registration and engagement efforts so we meet the voters WHERE THEY ARE. With antics from anti-voting legislators in Harrisburg who stop at nothing to disenfranchise Black, brown and young voters, so their voices are silenced at the polls, this work is now more critical than ever before. That’s why we’re working so hard to GET OUT THE VOTE and make sure people are registered so that we can fight for the freedoms in the birthplace of American democracy: Pennsylvania. Thanks for standing with us, Team NPP = The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents, and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = = || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . to receive fewer emails from us. **If we're going to reelect Maggie, we need your support. That's why we created personalized donation links for our top supporters, including you, friend. Here's your personalized link:**

name: Charles Booker
subject: Her sacrifice is why I’m here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

This Women’s History Month, I am reminded that I owe everything I have to
the strong women in my life, both past and present.

My mom raised me as a single parent and to be frank with you, life wasn’t
easy. There were times we didn’t have light or electricity. At one point,
we didn’t have a place to live because our house burned down.

I remember growing up, after doing my homework, mom would call me down for
dinner. Sometimes, she’d give me my plate and leave the kitchen. I noticed
she wasn’t eating, and asked her why.

After avoiding my question, she admitted she wasn’t eating to save food
for me. There’s no doubt that her sacrifice is why I’m here.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17015?refcode=em20220313-1646&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1646%2E346206%2E1U2n6U ][IMG]

But I know my story isn’t unique: there are tens of thousands of women in
Kentucky who are making painful sacrifices, working multiple jobs, and
still can’t make ends meet. That’s why I believe it’s time to write a new
kind of politics that works for families, not corporations. We need to
replace Rand Paul with a leader who understands the pain too many working
families and women in our country face.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17015?refcode=em20220313-1646&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1646%2E346206%2E1U2n6U ]If you’re ready to rise up with me in this work, will you make a
$5 donation to our people-powered campaign today?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17015?refcode=em20220313-1646&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1646%2E346206%2E1U2n6U ]Contribute $5

Today, my wife and I are parents to three incredible daughters.

Being a girl dad has been the greatest privilege and highest honor. My
daughters opened my eyes to my future, and showed me a level of love I
never knew existed.

They remind me everyday why we’re fighting to change our politics here in
Kentucky. I’ll do anything to make sure they grow up in a world where they
feel loved, safe, and secure.

That’s why I’m in this race and I know that together we can write a new
chapter in politics that celebrates the women in our lives and will ensure
a better future for all of our families. That’s why I’m in this race and I
know that together we can write a new chapter in politics that celebrates
the women in our lives and will ensure a better future for all of our
families.

Together,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220313-1646-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1646_346206_1U2n6U&akid=1646%2E346206%2E1U2n6U

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, This Women’s History Month, I am reminded that I owe everything I have to the strong women in my life, both past and present. My mom raised me as a single parent and to be frank with you, life wasn’t easy. There were times we didn’t have light or electricity. At one point, we didn’t have a place to live because our house burned down. I remember growing up, after doing my homework, mom would call me down for dinner. Sometimes, she’d give me my plate and leave the kitchen. I noticed she wasn’t eating, and asked her why. After avoiding my question, she admitted she wasn’t eating to save food for me. There’s no doubt that her sacrifice is why I’m here. [ ][IMG] But I know my story isn’t unique: there are tens of thousands of women in Kentucky who are making painful sacrifices, working multiple jobs, and still can’t make ends meet. That’s why I believe it’s time to write a new kind of politics that works for families, not corporations. We need to replace Rand Paul with a leader who understands the pain too many working families and women in our country face. [ ]If you’re ready to rise up with me in this work, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign today? [ ]Contribute $5 Today, my wife and I are parents to three incredible daughters. Being a girl dad has been the greatest privilege and highest honor. My daughters opened my eyes to my future, and showed me a level of love I never knew existed. They remind me everyday why we’re fighting to change our politics here in Kentucky. I’ll do anything to make sure they grow up in a world where they feel loved, safe, and secure. That’s why I’m in this race and I know that together we can write a new chapter in politics that celebrates the women in our lives and will ensure a better future for all of our families. That’s why I’m in this race and I know that together we can write a new chapter in politics that celebrates the women in our lives and will ensure a better future for all of our families. Together, Charles Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

Our district now includes Orange and Sullivan Counties and with so many new folks in New York’s 17th Congressional District, it’s never been more important to have the resources to hire more staff, train more volunteers, and gather the supplies needed to reach folks in every corner of our four-county district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = With voting rights, reproductive freedom, and so many other critical issues on the line, we cannot let the GOP take back control of Congress and hinder our progress toward a brighter future. We have a lot of work to do to ensure I can keep fighting, and every dollar we raise will fuel our efforts to keep me advocating for life-changing legislation in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Thank you for standing with me in this fight. subject: This is a big deal!
body:
This is crunch time for the future of America, and we need all patriot hands on deck.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc2sa6spate2aual50dapp8a6urcuhf3bhu7tel8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5nmupm6thj6ph32tr26qor9dr3eiqn8obnmcr64p5mm6p34o36m5h6dc73c9g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3ephgmiqj4pti65j39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
Fellow Conservative, _**This is crunch time for the future of America, and we need all patriot hands on deck.**_

**Our mid-month deadline is just a few days away, and March is our most important month yet.**

This is the _final month_ in the FIRST fundraising quarter of the election year - which means it’s our last chance to start the year off strong.

[**Pitch in TODAY so we can meet our critical mid-month goal and TAKE BACK THE SENATE!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrb811gk5j3see9tu9o9m8gp1cnhrckjt80lsnig_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) [**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zph3hs2fp7ihecsog1s8fpofo99pia83iblmripg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z16cj81ce53hkqgp271bb2t40imha9sa7ptu6spo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlt7rd5tcach2r296ev7co3h6l2fdvcdqhtqd02o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8fes55v1djedl4bo5p5lo06gnsdhm7aj6a8mc80_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4p0c63u7bqn1q6pqirpqjial39pd6vpq2b1f200_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqcs4q20or6p1a82j8fmkl9p3n1qrpghphp2ff2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) With inflation skyrocketing and gas prices getting higher, fundraising is more difficult over the past month.

_We know it’s hard in Joe Biden’s America, but just a few dollars could be the difference between a REPUBLICAN SENATE MAJORITY and two more years of socialist Schumer._

Republicans are ready to bring back America and stop the Biden administration’s socialist agenda - and if we don’t make this goal, the radical Left will have a blank check to bring our country to the point of no return.

[**So please, pitch in what you can so we can meet our mid-month goal and TAKE BACK THE SENATE for the American people!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjcedvimdb72soehps0t52em3l942lsaeo3rgmdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) [**TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd0lrbosci0rsv5ca7mhook3nvk5alkebt6j3qho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chie2ob4c9h2bs) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

name: Emma Brown, MarkKelly.com
subject: a lot of pressure
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I gave it a green light, even though it wasn’t in the budget.
#

Friends —
I made a difficult decision a few weeks ago.
We had a staff meeting to discuss all of the different dark-money groups running ads against us, and it was clear that we couldn’t wait a moment longer to start running television ads of our own.
I gave it a green light, and we put up our first ad on TV — Even though we weren’t sure we had enough of the budget to keep them on air.
The bet I made was that Mark’s supporters would come through and close the budget gap, just like you have time and time again.
But then we missed our goal in February. We came up short. And that puts an extraordinary amount of pressure on us to reach our goals in March — especially since this is an FEC deadline month.
So, please:
[**Can Mark count on you to make your first $3 contribution to his campaign? We’re short of where we need to be to reach our March goals so we’re kicking off a mid-month fundraising drive today to catch up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220313-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2323_6688874_OTriLD&akid=2323%2E6688874%2EOTriLD)

name: Rep. Demings
subject: if I miss this goal I'll have to make budget cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Three things you need to know about this race
| | |
---
I know you hear from me a lot, friend, so I'll make this quick. Here are the three things you need to know about this race:
| | | | Polling shows me just 2 points behind Marco Rubio, and experts say I have the potential to "flip this seat entirely." |
---|---|---|---
| | | | The last Senate election in Florida was decided by 0.12% of the vote, so there's zero room for error. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | We've made a lot of progress in closing the gap – **but I'm still falling 13% short of my midnight fundraising goal.** |
---|---|---|---
Missing this goal will force me to make budget cuts, cuts that could have drastic effects for our campaign. Experts are saying this race could decide Senate control, so I have to ask again:
**[Please, friend, can you rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap, defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42928018/334926667/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBjN2E2MC1mY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etA9tQmnhm14eZEFJUjzmqDYn-yhsh0QxgUvhJrLY7E=)**

Peter, I want to share my personal story with you.

I’ve never had anything handed to me. I grew up in Fresno, raised by a single mother who taught me the value of hard work, sacrifice, and commitment.

I dedicated my career to helping working folks in California — _by owning a small business, serving on local committees, and more._

But as I served in these positions, **I saw the havoc MAGA Republican Devin Nunes wreaked on our community in his do‐nothing decades in Congress.**

_In 2020, I finally had enough_ — so I ran to unseat Nunes, and came up just short of getting it done.

**So now, I’m asking you to trust me.**

I’m running for Congress this November to clean up the mess Nunes and Trump left and finally deliver much‐need progressive representation to my home.

_But I can’t do it alone, Peter!_

[**_Will you join my people‐powered campaign today by chipping in $3 toward our $20,000 mid‐month goal? I grew up in Fresno, raised by a single mother who taught me the value of hard work, sacrifice, and commitment. I dedicated my career to helping working folks in California — by owning a small business, serving on local committees, and more. But as I served in these positions, I saw the havoc MAGA Republican Devin Nunes wreaked on our community in his do‐nothing decades in Congress. In 2020, I finally had enough — so I ran to unseat Nunes, and came up just short of getting it done. So now, I’m asking you to trust me. name: Sen. Cortez Masto (D)
subject: this little girl has no clue
body:
The little girl in this photo has no clue what a wild ride life has in store for her. Right now, all she knows is the joy of weekend camping with her family, tearing into her mom’s homemade meatballs, and begging her dad to buy her a dirt bike.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM]
Her Dad raised her on three principles: work hard, be honest, and respect everyone. She spent her life watching him pour his heart into bettering his community, and she became a first-generation college graduate and pursued a career in law to protect that community.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM]
She went on to be elected Nevada’s Attorney General just as the 2008 financial crisis wreaked havoc on America’s middle-class families and our economy. She took on the Big Banks with a fellow Attorney General from California and secured $1.9 billion in relief for Nevada homeowners.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM]
In 2016, she would make history as the first woman from Nevada and first Latina ever elected to the United States Senate. The odds were stacked against her, and many said she had no chance of winning. Mitch McConnell and the GOP spent nearly $50 million to defeat her, but her grassroots team stood by her every step of the way.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM]
Derek, my story is one of community. It made me who I am today and it’s why I fight so hard for Nevada in the Senate. But I was just declared “the most vulnerable Democratic Senator” in the entire country, and Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate is leading me by 3 points in the polls.
Can you split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood right now to help me defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent and defend the Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM]
From college, to the courtroom, to the U.S. Senate — people have doubted that a Latina could compete and overcome the odds to win. I’ve proven them wrong every time, and I know that with your help, I can do it again.
My race will be one of the closest in the country and Nevada will be crucial for control of the Senate. GOP outside groups have already spent over $4 million to defeat me and flip the one seat they need to take back the Senate.
Derek, I need your help to close this polling gap and defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent. Please, split a contribution of $25 between campaign and CommonGood right now to help me defend Nevada and defend the Democratic Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220313_CGVA_CCM&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220308_CGVA_MF&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220308_CGVA_MF]
¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!
Catherine

Arlington, VA 22215

subject: FWD: Psaki’s Response to Your Rising Gas Prices?
body:

name: Team Marcus Flowers
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene sparks anger, calls Col. Vindman‘clueless’ and a ‘clown’ over Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
|
---
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUTVtN7TGJ1kouME24pd0piRCkOTu8ilME_JOxsvWNF0Y&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220313&n=1) Friend, People were furious when Marjorie Taylor Greene branded decorated veteran and former national security adviser Alexander Vindman a “clown” on Twitter for rebuking her comments she made about Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. **Here’s what happened** : Marjorie Taylor Greene took to Twitter to blame Joe Biden for Putin’s invasion. Vindman responded by calling out her party’s encouragement of Putin and her cheerleading of him to invade. Then Marjorie Taylor Greene called Vindman a clueless “clown.” Look, Vindman testified in the first impeachment of Donald Trump regarding his attempt to extract a quid pro quo from then-newly elected Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelensky -- so he knows a thing or two about patriotism. **It’s clear Marjorie Taylor Greene doesn’t have America’s best interests at heart, so she needs to be held accountable.** [**Marcus Flowers is a Democrat, Army Veteran running to unseat her this November. Will you add your name to our petition to show you stand with Marcus and condemn Greene's comments?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/20220311_vidnamn?e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220313&n=2) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/20220311_vidnamn?e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220313&n=3 "ADD MY NAME") [ADD MY NAME](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/20220311_vidnamn?e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220313&n=3)

It’s clear Marjorie Taylor Greene doesn’t have America’s best interests at heart, so she needs to be held accountable. | "ADD MY NAME" Thanks for your support -- it means more than you know, Team Flowers for Congress Paid for by Marcus for Georgia PO Box 532 Rome, GA 30162 United States "DONATE NOW >> " Marcus Flowers for Georgia · GA 30162, United States

name: Chris Evans, Beto for Texas
subject: Education, health care, jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hey, it's
Chris.

I'm currently in the car traveling with Beto to over 20 cities and towns
across Texas as part of our People of Texas campaign to meet with, listen
to, and learn from the people he will serve as Governor.

I've been with Beto since 2017, so I mean it when I say that the people of
Texas are ready to elect Beto as their next Governor.

I'll tell you more about what I'm seeing on the road in a moment — but
first I want to ask, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53941?refcode=ema20220313-180228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=180228%2E444211%2Epn3oU9 ]would you consider contributing $3
to keep Beto on the road and in front of voters?

From West Texas to East Texas and every part of this state, Beto is
spreading our positive vision of creating great jobs that pay a living
wage, fully funding our public schools while having the backs of our
teachers, and expanding Medicaid so more Texans can see a doctor and
afford their prescriptions. Check out some of the best headlines from our
recent events:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53941?refcode=ema20220313-180228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=180228%2E444211%2Epn3oU9 ]The Dallas Morning News Headline

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53941?refcode=ema20220313-180228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=180228%2E444211%2Epn3oU9 ]The News Headline

When Beto talks about ensuring that everyone in this state can live to
their full potential, he really means it. And it's clear voters can tell.

Every day we spend on the road traveling across the state, we're bringing
more people into our movement — and we’re gaining serious ground on Greg
Abbott.

Texans are ready for a Governor who cares about their health, their
livelihoods, and their families. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53941?refcode=ema20220313-180228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=180228%2E444211%2Epn3oU9 ]But we need YOUR help to elect Beto.
Will you chip in right now to help power our People of Texas campaign and
fund future events to reach voters?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53941?refcode=ema20220313-180228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=180228%2E444211%2Epn3oU9 ]Contribute $3

More soon,

Chris Evans
Communications Director, Beto for Texas

body:

#

Team —
We're reaching out with an urgent request today. Here's the situation:
Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ put Pennsylvania at the top of their list of races that will decide control of the Senate — they also said this race will be "particularly close."
And this month we're facing our final quarterly FEC reporting deadline before our May primary, which means this is one of our our last chances to show the strength of this grassroots team.

name: Giffords
subject: see this little girl?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Looks like she’s having the time of her life. Just eating some snacks without a care in the world
#

See this little girl?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220313-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1692_3935704_2D-MRl&akid=1692%2E3935704%2E2D-MRl)
Isn’t she cute? Just eating some snacks without a care in the world.
That little girl is Gabby Giffords.
We’re sure she never imagined that decades later she’d be leading a national movement to save lives from gun violence.
But that’s what she’s doing today. And she cannot do it alone. So before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close in two days, we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution - $3 or whatever you can afford - to help Gabby Giffords continue her fight to make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220313-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1692_3935704_2D-MRl&akid=1692%2E3935704%2E2D-MRl)

name: Team Melanie
subject: Electing Democrats is not enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAT1_fC1cOgl6o47BwXMisMVmaXr1W7Nq-ZgbN2AL3uv8JetGnhm3PtUr9zyHYRmZUDJRTynAFv4eJkx8ZOvqkGKo7ysEoXFsa65ZUhqem9znIMd8757sUeE7U-L1clSlnPUXXwoRI-Gg3A12iYFGhfSdLnbA-o-GFPeSgEHWbbTH92SbqmcUD5bpK0Hon7sAcFFdq_UQ1Jn_mJYcFblkQpiC6CWURgH1O2ObShZoTHi65LVffuiAuONgQzisGwsDuOCTduBp8EbAxjK8sXstA04_qpP4-5fbbX3d0Y-iQaugVdo-E5a-V1sOKYPcCuz43U/3kb/0wNW2ifgTCK22irRFKSEjA/h0/4pKhsMQKREPJewXfKDWL8Sbbm5cL30qmoIOe3BRXRvE)

Here are the facts, Peter Willis: If we’re going to get working families the help they need, electing Democrats is not enough.
**We must elect _better_ Democrats. **
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAT1_fC1cOgl6o47BwXMisMVP8f_a-bN9lbQsHQ_S001L1ITTbYjg4kyZO5SkeYy6g3Zp1eZ23hE9cLW53YTi2gEw9A0W8ac5dPHJbd73ejyaHFreKmpQpJDYBvLNU-kn4vCT8gb2vr8lCPITEcIiLEmHWFSxjNfnu_cs6V8zwgfKmXS1HaR8q8G8zcgdQQf3n77zMGqmjfuiBoOfGK3z2VXxktzLPuldmxSwUd2Zm1HRB1PORPsP1BX5rpQvm-l2oELgJ3RXGa1A6tjufsYdD6-eHs579xN5vacgze_bi2-3ifKDVrxpPHB7tOSgZr19RM/3kb/0wNW2ifgTCK22irRFKSEjA/h1/f2W5AVp6DhIg65ImALRvYTLBuTI9bY_Aja2C84Mnx8g)
---
When career politicians auction off the policies that affect our lives to the highest bidder, working people bear the cost: higher healthcare prices, tax breaks that benefit corporations and the uber-wealthy, and a massive income inequality gap that grows wider every year.
When so-called “centrists” refuse to stand for anything more than what benefits them most in that moment (looking at you, Senators Manchin and Sinema), policies that the VAST majority of Americans support — such as critical legislation to protect voting rights and the most ambitious social policy reform in decades — die before they’re ever brought to a vote.
**In 2022, not just any Democrat will do. We deserve representation in Congress that fights for our safety, our financial security, and our future. It’s time to elect an unbought Congress.**
That means we need a massive upswell of grassroots support to hit our make-or-break $20,000 end-of-quarter goal.
[**Can you pitch in now to send Melanie D’Arrigo — a _better_ Democrat — to fight for working families, not corporations or billionaires, in Washington? **](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAT1_fC1cOgl6o47BwXMisMVxw3zAWq_XlWVJsjunEeR4B8wa1VpjkSWzAih9uCCnbTDfaWA69zTyZlT734Ez73zl_OiLGcpgB871eQtXyhh7aL3FQpqjW-5lw1S8GK0PvE9eWJi8RHcHUtdayGZnz4YaJQv-SIGh0SMkb-e8LoyDlPtbkhnqZNSBBgKLzMc2xR76XeKPUbVrlnbKUhL8bP9GXUtps9TD1nWkIz9QRiXmOKynUydDKSSCrX_SW81n-euswgjnUBIukkEoPRs3WTepJwOZYNxJEHcSAbbcj2lYssIVlpjseT5eTmwijVkrLY/3kb/0wNW2ifgTCK22irRFKSEjA/h2/OSTASWIpZPRdyz4zInq8BW_ZUAZw4_eFiw2YRCehkJE)

name: Team Cranley-Fedor
subject: We wanted you to be the first to see these
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| We were so glad to receive Ohio’s hospitality throughout the tour. Hey team, John and Teresa have been _busy,_ to say the least — check out these headlines from the past week!
* * *
**Cranley, Fedor tout social justice platform in Columbus campaign stop** — Ohio Capitol Journal [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42923690/334904302/295924677?refcode=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDFiZDNhMC1lNGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTrU_fQtLmCWYQSuAZ57OYswbHdTrv9-uR-ldqZ0tak=&emci=b47199ca-7aa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289) Last week, John and Teresa wrapped up their Social Justice Tour, which saw them visit six cities across Ohio to discuss topics like the Ohio Innocence Project and human trafficking. In addition to social justice issues, John shared that his administration would work on expanding rural broadband, improving the water system, and ensuring every county has at least one federally qualified health center.
* * *
**Candidate for Ohio Governor calls for Ohio pension funds to divest from Russian assets** — 21 WFMJ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42923691/334904303/298140002?refcode=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDFiZDNhMC1lNGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTrU_fQtLmCWYQSuAZ57OYswbHdTrv9-uR-ldqZ0tak=&emci=b47199ca-7aa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289) Visiting Youngstown on Sunday, John spoke at the Saints Peter and Paul Ukrainian Orthodox Center about the need to pull Ohio pension funds from Russian companies. With $210 million for the Ohio Public Employees Retirement System and the State Teachers Retirement System invested in Russian assets, he wants to see it pulled immediately and invested in American companies. In John’s words: “It’s not enough to just rhetorically support Ukraine against Putin’s war of aggression. We must put our money where our mouth is.” "There's no excuse to make money by fueling Russia's war machine against Ukraine."
* * *
**Ohio gov. candidate speaks on human trafficking** — WKBN First News 27 Also in Youngstown was another stop on John and Teresa’s Social Justice Tour, where attendees heard from Laurese Glover, who spent twenty years in prison after being wrongfully convicted of murder, and Barbara Freeman, who was enslaved into human trafficking and forcibly addicted to drugs as a young girl. Continuing the theme of the Social Justice Tour — helping the wrongfully convicted and human trafficking survivors — John and Teresa connected with the people of Youngstown and laid out a vision that will get Ohio back to work and growing again. "And if I’m willing to fight for people in prison who are innocent, I will fight for the middle class of Ohio - I will fight for the Mahoning Valley," Cranley said. Teresa added: “Oppression is what’s evil — oppression is what really grabbed a hold of the victims who were so vulnerable in our society, and we have more and more people who are vulnerable.”
* * *
**Thanks for taking the time to read this, team — John and Teresa are immensely grateful to have you on the team!** **[Now, take the next step and chip in $25 (or anything that works for you) to help John and Teresa win this race and kickstart Ohio’s comeback>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42923692/334904304/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDFiZDNhMC1lNGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTrU_fQtLmCWYQSuAZ57OYswbHdTrv9-uR-ldqZ0tak=)** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42923693/334904305/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDFiZDNhMC1lNGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTrU_fQtLmCWYQSuAZ57OYswbHdTrv9-uR-ldqZ0tak=)** Be sure to follow us on Twitter **[@JohnCranley](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42923694/334904306/1960171926?refcode=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDFiZDNhMC1lNGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTrU_fQtLmCWYQSuAZ57OYswbHdTrv9-uR-ldqZ0tak=&emci=b47199ca-7aa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c01bd3a0-e4a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)** , and keep an eye out for more news from us in the weeks ahead! — Team Cranley-Fedor

subject: What side are these Republicans on?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
There is a fight for democracy happening in Ukraine and it’s not all that clear what side many Republicans are on.
#
Derek —
There is a fight for democracy happening in Ukraine and it’s not all that clear what side many Republicans are on.
Earlier this week, 31 Republican Senators voted against $13.6 billion in aid to Ukraine. None of them voted against trillion dollar tax cuts for the rich under Trump.
Meanwhile, Tucker Carlson and Fox News promote Russian disinformation every single day, trying to divide the American people.
And their leader - Donald Trump - is out there praising Putin as brilliant for his attempted slaughter of the Ukrainian people.
VoteVets has a critical role to play in this fight. Not just in beating back Russian propaganda at home, but in beating some of the Senators who are out of step with the American public when it comes to support for Ukraine.
But we cannot do either alone. So please:

| | Team, We’ll get straight to the point: we’re coming up on our biggest fundraising deadline yet.

We’ve seen what Sonia’s been able to accomplish in the State Senate with your support — like advancing criminal justice reforms and environmental justice reforms. And she’s ready to continue delivering the real progressive change that families need across our state once she’s elected Governor. But to get there, we’re going to need your help to bring even more folks into our movement and deliver urgent change.

[_**Before our critical March deadline, will you chip in $5 to ensure real change in Massachusetts? Your contribution will make a huge difference to this grassroots campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42923944/334907009/-1995710501?refcode=em_20220313_f_t_donate&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk5NjBiNy1lNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WlpfGSN8AOoIWXt3KyBMjAiIjHl8i8SQG09_60K1aZE=)

We have a real chance to deliver bold, transformative change across Massachusetts — affordable housing for working families, closing the racial wealth divide, and delivering reliable and green public transportation — but we need your help. Let’s send a message we know Sonia has what it takes to win.

[_**Please chip in $5 to help us hit our goal for this quarter and elect Sonia the next governor of Massachusetts.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42923945/334907010/-325426314?refcode=em_20220313_f_t_donate&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk5NjBiNy1lNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WlpfGSN8AOoIWXt3KyBMjAiIjHl8i8SQG09_60K1aZE=)

Thanks so much!

Team Sonia

name: Daniel Wasta
subject: Hey, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I know I'm biased...
| | |
---
Hey, Peter, it's Daniel (Abby's husband). First, I wanted to say thank you for being a part of this team. We're building a true grassroots movement, and I really appreciate you being a part of it. Second, I wanted to provide a few important updates ahead of Abby's first big (and public) FEC fundraising deadline of the election year.

Let's back up a bit and talk about Abby's opponent: Sen. Grassley (R-IA), who is facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters. He's spent his seven terms in office advancing far-right ideologies and sabotaging efforts to help working families. We didn't think it could get much worse, but then he defended Donald Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories and attempts to overturn last year's election. _Then, _he stood on stage with Trump at a rally here in Iowa and wholeheartedly accepted his endorsement. Honestly, as an Iowan and an American, it's been scary to watch.
I know I'm biased, but Abby is the exact opposite of Sen. Grassley and she is exactly the sort of person we need in the Senate. Seeing Abby fight for her community every single day gives me hope. She's everything that a leader should be: caring, passionate, hard-working, determined and ready to sit down and talk with anyone, regardless of their party. **She's the senator our state deserves and the one that it desperately needs.**
That brings me back to the FEC deadline Abby's up against. It's both an opportunity and a challenge: an opportunity to publicly – to the pundits, the media and Sen. Grassley himself – show the strength of this campaign. It's also a challenge to raise what we need to compete, particularly with the Senate Republican campaign arm sitting on more than $41 million in the bank to attack competitive challengers like Abby.
**Right now, here's what it's going to take to keep pace and blow this fundraising goal out of the water: raising another $50,000 by Tuesday's mid-month deadline. I get we're asking for a massive surge in grassroots support, but frankly, it's what it will take to compete and win this race.**
**So please, Peter:[ Can you make your very first donation of $5 to help Abby defeat Sen. Grassley, lift up the voices of working families like ours and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42929354/334935733/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk735-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTkxM2FmMy0wOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNTGZJT_zaJ1V5KgNgWy6dfMRP_U2r4BCrOQMijb3cs=)**

clean_body: I know I'm biased... | | | Hey, Peter, it's Daniel (Abby's husband). First, I wanted to say thank you for being a part of this team. We're building a true grassroots movement, and I really appreciate you being a part of it. Second, I wanted to provide a few important updates ahead of Abby's first big (and public) FEC fundraising deadline of the election year. Let's back up a bit and talk about Abby's opponent: Sen. Grassley (R-IA), who is facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters. He's spent his seven terms in office advancing far-right ideologies and sabotaging efforts to help working families. We didn't think it could get much worse, but then he defended Donald Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories and attempts to overturn last year's election. Then, he stood on stage with Trump at a rally here in Iowa and wholeheartedly accepted his endorsement. Honestly, as an Iowan and an American, it's been scary to watch. I know I'm biased, but Abby is the exact opposite of Sen. Grassley and she is exactly the sort of person we need in the Senate. Seeing Abby fight for her community every single day gives me hope. She's everything that a leader should be: caring, passionate, hard-working, determined and ready to sit down and talk with anyone, regardless of their party. She's the senator our state deserves and the one that it desperately needs. That brings me back to the FEC deadline Abby's up against. It's both an opportunity and a challenge: an opportunity to publicly – to the pundits, the media and Sen. Grassley himself – show the strength of this campaign. It's also a challenge to raise what we need to compete, particularly with the Senate Republican campaign arm sitting on more than $41 million in the bank to attack competitive challengers like Abby. Right now, here's what it's going to take to keep pace and blow this fundraising goal out of the water: raising another $50,000 by Tuesday's mid-month deadline. I get we're asking for a massive surge in grassroots support, but frankly, it's what it will take to compete and win this race. So please, Peter:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for all that you do. It means so much to Abby and me. – Daniel | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

_"Incumbents like Bennet – even in a state like Colorado – will not be immune." _ Pundits are predicting a possible “red wave” in the midterms this year and my race is not immune: This year my seat was ranked in the top ten Senate seats most likely to flip, a poll showed me losing by 1% to a GOP opponent, and then my race was moved closer to a toss-up. _But this does not mean the sky is falling, because I’ve seen what this grassroots team is capable of._ Thanks to support from folks like you, I secured historic investments in repairing our bridges and roads that will create hundreds of thousands of jobs; banned surprise medical bills after medical emergencies to protect folks in their most vulnerable moments; and secured tax cuts for working families. But all of that progress means this race will be an uphill battle, and the GOP knows this. That’s why the National GOP raised over $120 million this cycle. They can use that warchest to fund attack ads distorting my record and bankroll my opponent. With your support, I know we can regain our footing in this race. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42929360/334936092/1927938479?refcode=20220313_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzY1N2QxMy0wOWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OauMsNgs81_g_tduhDF94I-qAwhG6x3LRFkEqPEJwQ=)
Friends — In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a split contribution to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Our race is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country. Every day some new super PAC or dark money group is spending to beat us. They spend it on television, they spend it online, they spend it on false attacks — anything and everything they can to turn this election. And the truth is, our ability to defend this seat means we have to meet every single goal we set for ourselves. Because every time we fall behind in our fundraising, it could mean us falling behind in the polls — and make it harder and harder to catch up. That’s why this mid-month fundraising drive is so important. Because things are heating up in our race, and we’re slipping a little bit on our fundraising. The timing is not great, and I need your help: [**Can you please split a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight tonight? We would not be asking if it were not so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42929361/334936093/1927938479?refcode=20220313_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzY1N2QxMy0wOWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OauMsNgs81_g_tduhDF94I-qAwhG6x3LRFkEqPEJwQ=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42929362/334936105/-1534947712?refcode=20220313_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzY1N2QxMy0wOWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OauMsNgs81_g_tduhDF94I-qAwhG6x3LRFkEqPEJwQ=)
Thank you in advance for contributing to help us catch up. It means a lot. Mark Kelly

| | | Friend, Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers... But it doesn’t have enough folks who know what it means to represent the best parts of New Hampshire - the spirit of freedom, the sense of volunteerism, and the responsibility of giving back to the community. These are qualities that have helped shape me into the person that I am today as someone who has lived his American Dream here in the Granite State. That’s why I know that we need more hard-working New Hampshire values coming from our leaders... **_Not more out-of-touch, progressive D.C. priorities!_** I’m standing up for the 603 this year because YOU deserve a voice in your nation’s capital. We need to bring New Hampshire values to a place that leads them now more than ever! [**_Will you help bring the best of our state to Washington, D.C. in 2022?_**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTA1MTc5NzYyNDQwMDE4NTg5JmM9djJvMyZlPTAmYj05NDI4MTQ2NjcmZD1tN2I0Zzdt.rQ4HXCqTTLFpN-FFS80jrykPaqsdtsMlj6GPN5dxPa4)****

name: Congresswoman Demings
subject: Friend, here's an update on my race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
| | |
---
I wanted to share an update on my race, friend, and I hope you'll read this through to the end.
The Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – nearly every single way you can imagine. And recent polling could be confirming this: I'm trailing 2 points behind Marco Rubio when the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points.
Does it worry me? Absolutely. Particularly when I'm just hours from my midnight fundraising deadline and _still_ falling 12% short of my $10,000 midnight fundraising goal. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. **It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate. **
I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so, _so_ much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's daily fundraising goal by midnight.
Every single dollar will make a difference in this must-win race, so I'm asking: Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority. Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42929658/334937526/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2613-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmE0OTIyMS0wZGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqkcyKcDgMb2VtgPZFFItqdZ6GZ1y6l6cSrefNfz2J8=)**
With so much gratitude,

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. clean_body: | | | I wanted to share an update on my race, friend, and I hope you'll read this through to the end. The Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – nearly every single way you can imagine. And recent polling could be confirming this: I'm trailing 2 points behind Marco Rubio when the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points. Does it worry me? Absolutely. Particularly when I'm just hours from my midnight fundraising deadline and still falling 12% short of my $10,000 midnight fundraising goal. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate. I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so, so much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's daily fundraising goal by midnight. Every single dollar will make a difference in this must-win race, so I'm asking: Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority. Here's the best link: = With so much gratitude, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & .
