name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: This campaign is funded by teachers, nurses, 5 beekeepers and YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Who a candidate fights for in Washington is a direct reflection of who funded their campaign
#

The contrast between how we fund our campaign vs. our opponents Ted Budd and Pat McCrory could not be clearer.
They have taken nearly a million dollars from corporate PACs over the years.
Cheri Beasley? $0 from corporate PACs. Not a dime.
[**Rejecting corporate PAC money is the right thing to do because this is a campaign about the people and for the people. But it also means grassroots support is that much more important. So we need to ask if Cheri can count on you to make your first online donation to our campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220313-1-ma&refcode2=532.357359.hG9_8l&t=1&akid=532%2E357359%2EhG9_8l)
How people fund their campaigns tells you a lot about their priorities. **Because who a candidate fights for in Washington is all too often a direct result of who they take money from.** Too many politicians are bought by special interests.
That’s why we’re so proud to be doing this the right way. This campaign is funded by people from all walks of life pitching in what they can — educators, frontline healthcare workers, postal workers and more. We’ve even got five beekeepers powering this movement!
Cheri is in this fight for families like yours – not corporate PACs or other mega-donors. She’s running to lower costs from prescription drugs to groceries, make quality education accessible to all, repair the justice system, protect voting rights for ALL Americans and save our planet from climate catastrophe _(and save the bees too!)_.
But the only way _any_ of this is possible is if all of us do our part and get involved.
[**Please make a contribution to stand with our campaign today. Even a single contribution can be so impactful — especially when thousands of others from every corner of the country join in at the same time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220313-1-ma&refcode2=532.357359.hG9_8l&t=2&akid=532%2E357359%2EhG9_8l)
Thank you,
Team Beasley
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220313-1-ma&refcode2=532.357359.hG9_8l&t=3&akid=532%2E357359%2EhG9_8l)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=532%2E357359%2EhG9_8l). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=532%2E357359%2EhG9_8l). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=532_357359_hG9_8l&akid=532%2E357359%2EhG9_8l) today to help us make history.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Mark Kelly needs our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DL3MfF775k7DslQ3NF37kfZv9zgNFwHk&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, Mark Kelly is in urgent need of your support.
Polling averages show him virtually tied with his likely Republican opponent, and Donald Trump is rallying supporters to defeat him by saying: "Taking back America begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate."
**With the Senate split 50-50, helping Mark win is crucial to keeping Mitch McConnell from retaking control of the chamber.[That's why I'm asking you today: Will you split a donation of $5 or more between my and Mark Kelly's campaigns to protect every Democratic seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4mk?refcode=jtk1130-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
It's no wonder why Republicans are zeroing in on Mark. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip a single Democratic seat to take back Senate control for the GOP - which would spell disaster for everything from our environment to reproductive freedoms to the economic well-being of hardworking people. If we want any shot of keeping and expanding our Democratic majority and of delivering on the progress that the American people mandated, then we must keep Mark Kelly in the Senate.
Beyond that, we must keep Mark Kelly in the Senate because he is an extraordinary senator. Hard-working, exceptionally intelligent, profoundly principled - Mark Kelly is the ideal public servant. An American who puts his fellow citizens' well-being first. We __all__ need him.
That's why I told Mark that this team would raise $5,000 before midnight tonight - every dollar of it from grassroots donations - to keep our Senate seats blue. We don't have much time and are still coming up short, so please, can I count on your contribution?
**[Split a donation of $5 or more right now- whatever you can spare toward our midnight deadline - to help Sen. Mark Kelly and me win and protect Democratic control of the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4mk?refcode=jtk1130-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://action.richardblumenthal.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/index.sjs?unsubscribe_page_KEY=550&Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1408527&refcode=jtk1130-bu-nd)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Our chance to take back Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Rebecca Kleefisch is the only person I trust to fire Tony Evers.
| Friend,
---
Tony Evers has failed Wisconsin.
---
He sided with rioters while Kenosha was set ablaze, he sided with liberal union cronies over your children’s education, and in the end, he had the gall to tell you it was best for you.
---
_I won’t beat around the bush, if we don’t FIRE Tony Evers this November, then we too will have failed Wisconsin, Friend._
---
**And there’s only one person I trust to finish the job – my very own Lieutenant Governor, Rebecca Kleefisch.**
---

clean_body: Rebecca Kleefisch is the only person I trust to fire Tony Evers. | Friend, Tony Evers has failed Wisconsin. He sided with rioters while Kenosha was set ablaze, he sided with liberal union cronies over your children’s education, and in the end, he had the gall to tell you it was best for you. I won’t beat around the bush, if we don’t FIRE Tony Evers this November, then we too will have failed Wisconsin, Friend. And there’s only one person I trust to finish the job – my very own Lieutenant Governor, Rebecca Kleefisch. I hate to admit it, but this toss-up governor’s race is going to come down to fundraising. The DGA has already amassed a warchest of over $54 million to prop up Evers along with his $10.5 million in cash on hand. His entire reelection strategy has become buying this race, and it’s clear why... The latest polling shows that a majority of Wisconsin voters would NOT vote to reelect him. But if Rebecca falls behind on even one of her monthly fundraising goals, we risk giving Evers the upper hand. We simply can’t afford to waste our chance to return to better times, Friend. You’ve always been a loyal supporter of both Rebecca and me, but now more than ever, we’re counting on YOUR help once again. Thank you, Scott Walker 45th Governor of Wisconsin Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: John Fetterman
subject: I am wearing a suit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I may or may not have put on a suit to ask you this:
#
Derek, what I'm about to ask you is *incredibly* important. 👇
So much so, that I may or may not have put on a suit to do it.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45279?refcode=em20220313-4956&amount=5&t=1&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)
According to our records, you haven’t chipped in to our campaign yet. And that’s totally OK! But if you’ve been on the fence, I want to tell you why today would be a GREAT day to pitch in just $3.
We're setting a mid-month goal of raising $25,000 by Tuesday night to make sure we keep our fundraising track until it all becomes public at the end of the quarter! **We did the math, and we can actually reach it if everyone who reads this email who *hasn’t* donated chips in $3 today to officially join our amazing grassroots team.**
[**_Will you please make your first-ever donation to invest in this campaign? It would mean the world to me + Gisele, even if it’s just a few bucks._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45279?refcode=em20220313-4956&amount=5&t=4&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45279?refcode=em20220313-4956&amount=5&t=5&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)**
When my team and I say that our campaign is "people-powered," we mean YOU. You're "people." 😁
YOU are who is making this the leading campaign to flip this seat blue and win that 51st vote for our Democratic majority in the Senate.
And it's YOU who I am so, so thankful for.
I realize that not every single person will be able to give today. **But Gisele and I are coming to you in the hope that you'll be among the people who will.** So I'll ask once more:
[**_Will you consider clicking this link and giving $3 or any amount that feels right? Any amount at all will make a tremendous difference ahead of this week’s deadline._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45279?refcode=em20220313-4956&amount=5&t=8&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45279?refcode=em20220313-4956&amount=5&t=9&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)**
Thank you so much for your generosity. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220313-4956-footer&t=10&refcode2=4956_434096_YNti4F&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=4956%2E434096%2EYNti4F)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: I may or may not have put on a suit to ask you this: Derek, what I'm about to ask you is incredibly important. 👇 So much so, that I may or may not have put on a suit to do it. According to our records, you haven’t chipped in to our campaign yet. And that’s totally OK! But if you’ve been on the fence, I want to tell you why today would be a GREAT day to pitch in just $3. We're setting a mid-month goal of raising $25,000 by Tuesday night to make sure we keep our fundraising track until it all becomes public at the end of the quarter! We did the math, and we can actually reach it if everyone who reads this email who hasn’t donated chips in $3 today to officially join our amazing grassroots team. When my team and I say that our campaign is "people-powered," we mean YOU. You're "people." 😁 YOU are who is making this the leading campaign to flip this seat blue and win that 51st vote for our Democratic majority in the Senate. And it's YOU who I am so, so thankful for. I realize that not every single person will be able to give today. But Gisele and I are coming to you in the hope that you'll be among the people who will. So I'll ask once more: Thank you so much for your generosity. 🙏 John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

_“I just stay out of national politics altogether ...national politics is a distraction that is used frankly by those in power in Sacramento [as] kind of a smokescreen for their own failures.”_
That’s what Assemblyman Kevin Kiley told the Associated Press when asked if he voted for Trump or supports his policies. 👀
He said this one month before coming in 6th place in the recall election against Governor Newsom...
And five months before announcing his run for Congress. 🙄

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Building the Ohio we deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
I’m building a stronger Ohio, and I need you to help me.

Team,
We’re so close to hitting our mid-month goal of $15,000, I wanted to write to you one more time to explain why it’s so important we get there.
I’m the only non-millionaire in this race. Unlike my opponents, I don’t have millions of my own dollars to pour into my campaign. Everything we’ve built so far has been thanks to grassroots supporters like you, and the momentum has been incredible.
**[We’ve shattered fundraising records already, and I know we can do it again. Will you donate $5 towards our mid-month goals?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42930113/334940340/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220313_2_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRlZjVjZC0xNGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-jGjKph3RxKpz49F7anY3rlmJ9lo9_n_zp_m357Osa8=)**
I will fight for your families like yours every day in office. We deserve an Ohio where one job is enough to make ends meet, where we have accountability and transparency in our government, and where every single person has the opportunity to succeed, regardless of zip code.
**[I’m building a stronger Ohio, and I need you to help me. We’re still $1,298 short from our mid-month goals. Can you pitch in $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42930114/334940341/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220313_2_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRlZjVjZC0xNGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-jGjKph3RxKpz49F7anY3rlmJ9lo9_n_zp_m357Osa8=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

name: Keystone Pipeline Petition (via House GOP)
subject: We saw this coming. Did you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must restore American energy independence.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfuejqfqamom7em5p760s0rv44pfpa6eh9q6k8u8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrmaohkmlrj8sdkeko6fclhemqb8orme5gb2ornm5hn1c74clr70oj46ljj7chnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj39ppjckrrcob661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm4o37c1i6coh5u)

| |
---
| | | President Trump predicted this disastrous energy crisis back in 2020. He warned us all that Joe Biden would destroy the oil industry and continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil.

Now gas prices continue to keep going up under President Biden's watch! $4.. $5... even $6 now!

**We 've had enough, haven't you? **

It's time that Joe Biden brings back the Keystone Pipeline _and_ restores American energy independence.

Help us send a clear message to Biden and add your name to our petition to demand Biden bring back the Keystone Pipeline.

---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0mrhi126fq5cr1q6unmtkm63q0b0eiqne304mto_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9g6eo34cph2bs "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: House GOP Alert
Date: Wed., March 09, 2022 at 1:29 PM
Subject: Tell Joe Biden: Bring Back the Keystone Pipeline
To: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhugon2p4u7q4m43r742bkkcp8avfjgn0surr3e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9g6eo34cph2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_

Joe Biden has announced a ban on Russian oil and gas in response to Putin's war on Ukraine.

_**Now, instead of turning to American energy to fill the gap, Biden wants to buy oil from Iran, Venezuela, or Saudi Arabia. **_

Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT! Now, Biden has launched an all-out war on American energy and American jobs.

On Day One of his Administration, Joe Biden **GUTTED** American energy independence by shutting down American energy production. Then he worsened our dependence on oil from hostile countries by **CANCELING** the Keystone XL Pipeline.
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z54g1c8oq7mjktafnodst6lb0vp0pphd5k8o5j40_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9g6eo34cph2bs "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
To make things worse, Biden greenlit Russian pipelines, allowing foreign energy to thrive while Americans faced higher prices at the pump.

**Joe Biden would rather buy oil and gas from foreign countries who hate us than create American jobs and restore our energy independence --_let that sink in._ **

Americans are sick and tired of Biden putting America LAST. Biden MUST bring back the Keystone XL Pipeline and restore American energy independence.

Biden won't listen unless the American people raise their voices and speak out against his war on American energy. body:
| | | **BREAKING:
Beto O'Rourke and Stacey Abrams GAINING in the polls**

**[Did you see this?! The latest polls just revealed that Beto O'Rourke and Stacey Abrams are GAINING on the GOP! It's simple: If Beto wins in Texas and Stacey wins in Georgia, Democrats up and down the ballot could follow them to victory - so it's critical that we move quickly to build on their momentum and help elect House Democrats all across the country who share their vision. Please, we can't do it without you: Will you join Beto and Stacey in the fight with a $3 gift before midnight to elect House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Beto O'Rourke announced he was running to DEFEAT extremist Republican Greg Abbott and finally FLIP Texas blue:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

The latest reports reveal both Beto AND Stacey are CLIMBING in the polls - and are within striking distance of WINNING these critical states!!

**This is HUGE: **

When Beto and Stacey ran in 2018, they helped turn out Democratic voters all across Texas and Georgia - _enough to FLIP three House seats and secure our HISTORIC House Majority!!_

So now, as Beto and Stacey fight to win in these critical swing states, we have an INCREDIBLE opportunity to replicate their momentum and SAVE our House Majority once and for all.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Kina Collins
body:
While most candidates for Congress are attending fundraisers and making calls to donors, Kina Collins is on the streets.
#
Peter,
It is all too common for corporations like Amazon, Walmart or McDonalds to donate to establishment Democrats in Congress, but in IL-7 there is a special situation. Representative Danny Davis was the 3rd most corporate funded Democrat in Congress last election cycle. In fact 73% of his money came from Corporate PACs. **That is why we need Kina Collins in Congress, and why Justice Democrats is behind her 100%.**
While most candidates for Congress are attending fundraisers and making calls to donors, Kina Collins is in the streets — at Amazon warehouse walkouts, protests for police accountability, and standing in solidarity with Starbucks and McDonalds employees demanding a living wage. That’s how AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush defeated out-of-touch incumbents, and how we’re going to defeat a 25-year incumbent and send Kina Collins to replace him.
Running for Congress without corporate money is hard, but Kina knows that you can either represent corporations or you can represent the people. **[Will you make a $3 contribution to help Kina win this race so she can be a real representative to working-class Chicagoans?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97612?refcode=em20220313-22375&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=22375%2E1203867%2EWi1rAV)**
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97612?refcode=em20220313-22375&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=22375%2E1203867%2EWi1rAV)
The Illinois 7th is a district that has been left behind. It suffers from closing schools and hospitals, crumbling infrastructure, and lack of gun control. It’s become clear that Chicagoans don’t need a status quo Congressman who doesn’t show up for work, they need a fighter like Kina Collins.
When Kina was 8 years old, she witnessed a shooting in front of her house. She knew the victim and she knew the shooters. From that day she has devoted her life to organizing to fight the underlying causes of gun violence. In 2014, she helped lead the fight for accountability in the police murder of 17-year-old Laquan McDonald, and just a month ago, was arrested after protesting the early release of his killer. Recently she has been the executive director of the largest Gun Violence Prevention non-profit in Illinois.
Kina is a working-class organizer running for Congress because the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. [If you agree, can you make a contribution directly to Kina Collins?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97612?refcode=em20220313-22375&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22375%2E1203867%2EWi1rAV)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97612?refcode=em20220313-22375&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=22375%2E1203867%2EWi1rAV)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=22375%2E1203867%2EWi1rAV) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=22375%2E1203867%2EWi1rAV) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220313-22375-footer&t=25&refcode2=22375_1203867_Wi1rAV&akid=22375%2E1203867%2EWi1rAV)**

Representative Danny Davis was the 3rd most corporate funded Democrat in Congress last election cycle. In fact 73% of his money came from Corporate PACs. That is why we need Kina Collins in Congress, and why Justice Democrats is behind her 100%. While most candidates for Congress are attending fundraisers and making calls to donors, Kina Collins is in the streets — at Amazon warehouse walkouts, protests for police accountability, and standing in solidarity with Starbucks and McDonalds employees demanding a living wage. That’s how AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush defeated out-of-touch incumbents, and how we’re going to defeat a 25-year incumbent and send Kina Collins to replace him. Running for Congress without corporate money is hard, but Kina knows that you can either represent corporations or you can represent the people. The Illinois 7th is a district that has been left behind. It suffers from closing schools and hospitals, crumbling infrastructure, and lack of gun control. It’s become clear that Chicagoans don’t need a status quo Congressman who doesn’t show up for work, they need a fighter like Kina Collins. When Kina was 8 years old, she witnessed a shooting in front of her house. She knew the victim and she knew the shooters. From that day she has devoted her life to organizing to fight the underlying causes of gun violence. In 2014, she helped lead the fight for accountability in the police murder of 17-year-old Laquan McDonald, and just a month ago, was arrested after protesting the early release of his killer. Recently she has been the executive director of the largest Gun Violence Prevention non-profit in Illinois. Kina is a working-class organizer running for Congress because the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

name: AJ (Matt and Cynthia for RI)
subject: 6 months from today
body:
| | | Friend, Exactly 6 months from today, Rhode Islanders will have the opportunity to replace the conservative politicians who’ve controlled our state government for decades with a Governor, Lt. Governor and dozens of inspiring, visionary candidates who share a bold, progressive platform. Matt, Cynthia, and the 50 RI Political Co-op candidates they’ll be running alongside will then be able to lead the country by enacting a Green New Deal, universal health care, and sweeping racial justice policies in our state. The next 6 months will be hugely determinative for the future of Rhode Island, and possibly the country. But how the next 6 months play out will be determined in many ways by the groundwork we lay _now_. **Throughout my time working and volunteering on political campaigns, I’ve seen the difference between ones that are well-resourced and not well-resourced.** Campaigns with strong early fundraising numbers arrive in the summer months before a primary with tons of staff recruiting volunteers, knocking on doors, delivering yard signs and dropping off literature at voters’ doors. Volunteers start canvassing shifts with plenty of snacks and clipboards packed with all of the materials they need. A not well-resourced campaign looks much more hectic, with staff stretched thin and scrambling to do as much as they can on a shoestring budget. As our field program kicks into high gear over the coming months, it’s vital that we have the resources to succeed. ****[**That’s why I’m asking if you can start a monthly recurring donation now to get us prepared to win exactly 6 months from today!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yVYYsIDNX1DfXh1F5jUPC7_od5KzpA_pkPNkeMl6OXBngCxnGatTf8ISve91z2xHFvKxUf8FQ0sOUuo5UQUVCXqKxDyw_HxlC2hCx8LSsxf4O46-oT9PJ2gIPNhuCGlm4bpLWP_u1VBOLTU8UfFv7yAHHnQdK9EmGEf5sHYDhP_5TIFz177_YRvY05EqCYSVRNf6OUGaeK9FtBt4EyRtsqPPU6QW5tqh2ZR9zs1GxJBrpILvMf8tjFRirRUl5K8JMflwYiJo9bzQLEQe0iV7RbMvRfOAoXEvH9lSaLSN_hFA/3kb/kvxz_l0rRfqhWcioi78VEQ/h0/XIfY3-8ES96jtJaA3cIaWwPoZZ0C7dKBJeTUX-WAo7E) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 A MONTH](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yVYYsIDNX1DfXh1F5jUPC7_od5KzpA_pkPNkeMl6OXBrKtTjA4eYK7atDsWWlQ0itSKXdGxE7XtP2M4ldVBLjobP4Mo5mRrWSgPz1Nu_uGfaSFzrkvoBDJGDO-EiILY3ph0N0lQCUsUK-6DrZekSnhQihjx21kYtJ06f4j5rgxKykWjNFDn4SdLHBTVIl16aFOGjnywIphIubSF7OnTM-lUtV41sFn3t7E1KV789Kf5mJwKISWOkhPl61Ovcv01R9vt1wh9cvi_YYY2bH_tkN4iKPzK6vmwu8bgYu3s4ossg/3kb/kvxz_l0rRfqhWcioi78VEQ/h1/ptiIjdUFnA3YUHOnKmuyV3I8wmjuuXtYcT3ii8KNN-8)

name: Marvin James
subject: Hi 👋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Hi there, it's Marvin from Jazz Lewis's campaign for Congress.
I'll be direct: we still need 17 donations today to stay on track to meeting our mid-month goal. Can you pitch in whatever you can right away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/team_jazz?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&id=129997837&refcode2=body_ask1]
Here's your personal link to give: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/team_jazz?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&id=129997837 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/team_jazz?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&id=129997837]
Meeting this goal means we can keep up our momentum so Jazz can be the fresh, bold voice our families need in Congress. He's proven that he is an effective progressive leader with his work in the Maryland House of Delegates, like banning solitary confinement for juveniles and pregnant women, funding to open grocery stores in food deserts, and getting the first cardiac care unit in Prince George's County built. Now, with our help, he can take our fight for the change that can't wait to Congress.
But we have to keep hitting our fundraising targets so we can reach enough voters with Jazz’s message to make it happen.
You can make a huge difference right now. Chip in whatever you can to help us wrap up this weekend on track. We need 17 more donations today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/team_jazz?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&id=129997837&refcode2=body_ask2]
We made this personalized donation link for you: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/team_jazz?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&id=129997837 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/team_jazz?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&id=129997837]
Thanks for being part of this people-powered movement,
Marvin James
Campaign Manager, Friends of Jazz Lewis
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

subject: President Obama - "Whatever you've done so far is not enough"

body:
Make sure your donation has THREE TIMES THE IMPACT!
| | | **President Obama is counting on YOU to help defend Biden's Senate majority** \-- _but we are missing your donation ahead of TUESDAY'S mid-month deadline!_

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6921?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220313-UrgentRequest-ObamaTIMFRv1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220313-UrgentRequest-ObamaTIMFRv1-Pros-sl1&akid=3317%2E9716520%2EE_Jhxn) | **YOUR DONATION: REQUESTED**

**3X-IMPACT MATCH OFFER: ACTIVE**

name: Peter Welch
subject: How we end the Senate filibuster.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
The filibuster gives power to Mitch McConnell.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=132%2E61531%2E9GVf6F)
Hello,
The Senate filibuster isn’t just a relic of a bygone era of American politics—it’s still being weaponized by Senate Republicans to prevent Democrats from passing needed legislation. [**It’s past time we get rid of the filibuster—add your name to our petition if you agree.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-end-filibuster?source=em_20220313_p_p_filibuster&t=3&akid=132%2E61531%2E9GVf6F)
The filibuster stands in the way of democracy. It’s the reason that we haven’t raised the minimum wage, passed commonsense gun violence prevention reforms, or let Medicare negotiate drug prices—even those all of those policies are popular among a strong majority of Americans.
Even with Democrats holding the majority, we’ve seen piece after piece and piece _after piece_ of crucial legislation die in the Senate after we pass it in the House, all because the filibuster allows for minority rule.
You know, before I went to Washington, I served in the Vermont state Senate, including as President Pro Tem. I worked with Republicans to pass legislation that helped Vermonters. We shared a cooperative spirit that’s totally alien to Mitch McConnell, and we didn’t have a supermajority requirement like the filibuster. In fact, _no other state Senate in the country_ hands power to the minority party the way the current filibuster rule does.
I’m committed to ending the filibuster as senator, but we can make our voices heard loud and clear right now that there’s no place for the 60-vote filibuster anymore—not with the future of our country at stake. The more signatures we can add to this petition, the stronger our case that the filibuster has got to go.
Right now, the filibuster has an iron grip on the Senate’s ability to legislate effectively. That makes 2022 the year we must end the Senate filibuster. [**Sign our petition if you’d like to play a role in making it happen.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-end-filibuster?source=em_20220313_p_p_filibuster&t=4&akid=132%2E61531%2E9GVf6F)
Thanks again,
Peter

---

This is one of the top pickup opportunities for Republicans in the entire nation. So, if you care about kicking Nancy Pelosi out of power, this is the seat we need to win!

Thank you for your support,
Scott Baugh

And, as long as she is in Congress, none of our communities are safe from new, liberty-restricting mandates. This is one of the top pickup opportunities for Republicans in the entire nation. So, if you care about kicking Nancy Pelosi out of power, this is the seat we need to win! Thank you for your support, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. name: Max Steiner
subject: My response to LaMalfa’s March e-Newsletter:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42928057/334926903/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTFmYTgzNS1mZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OR9sVBBWui9iYWoThpSB1bmORWqZXTY7G_TnamKuHFU=)
Friend,

Our last “LaMalfa Takedown” a few weeks ago was very well received, so we’ll continue the tradition going forward. I’ll try to add some more context to LaMalfa’s arguments as well since not everyone who gets my emails gets LaMalfa’s newsletter, which can understandably be a bit confusing.

LaMalfa devotes most of his email to complaining about water and claiming that the state is wasting it. There are a few issues here:

**First, it’s blatant selfishness.** LaMalfa is a huge beneficiary of state water subsidies in addition to millions in direct federal subsidies. In LaMalfa’s mind, the government exists to make him and his farming buddies richer – and an action that does not make him better off is “wasteful tyranny”.

**Second, the reason our reservoirs are dangerously low on water is because of CLIMATE CHANGE, which LaMalfa does not believe in.** We haven’t had serious rain since December, a false Spring and subsequent frost decimated the almond crop, and the New York Times is running articles on how we are in a “1200-year drought”. LaMalfa refuses to recognize the reality of climate change – because he refers to put politics over facts.

**Third, LaMalfa took the opportunity to brag about cornering President Biden after the State of the Union to ask for money for Sites reservoir. So now we have our congressman, who voted against the infrastructure bill and against certifying Biden’s election, begging Biden for infrastructure spending.**

LaMalfa’s section on the Central Arizona Project -- which redirects Colorado River water to Phoenix -- has a special relevance to me. My great-uncle, Wes Steiner, was the first Director of the Arizona Department of Water Resources and he championed water infrastructure as an alternative to groundwater overuse -- which had become a huge problem by the mid-1970’s in Arizona. I’m incredibly proud of Uncle Wes’s work. I wish LaMalfa knew the whole story of the Central Arizona Project -- which saw tough compromises between agricultural, urban, and mining interests -- but LaMalfa just assumes that every water project is built BY taxpayers FOR big farmers.

The section on fire management isn’t terrible, but it’s too little, too late. LaMalfa has had 10 years in Congress to push for meaningful reforms to the U.S. Forest Service: he’s done nothing useful. Pretty words can’t coverup a terrible record.

LaMalfa’s final section, on why Ukraine means we need to “drill baby, drill” is despicable. He doesn’t even devote a sentence to Ukrainian civilians dying because of Putin’s decision to invade. Trump is calling Putin a “genius” and sycophants like LaMalfa have decided to make Ukraine into an oil industry talking point. It’s gross.

**LaMalfa’s newsletters prove that our congressman cares only about himself. Everything out of his mouth is either an anti-Biden talking point or a selfish demand for another government subsidy.**

**[That's it for the LaMalfa newsletter recap. If you agree with my commentary and are ready to support my campaign to unseat Doug LaMalfa, please take a moment to chip in a donation to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42928058/334926904/360059203?refcode=em-3.13.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTFmYTgzNS1mZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OR9sVBBWui9iYWoThpSB1bmORWqZXTY7G_TnamKuHFU=)** | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42928059/334926905/360059203?refcode=em-3.13.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTFmYTgzNS1mZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OR9sVBBWui9iYWoThpSB1bmORWqZXTY7G_TnamKuHFU=)**
---

Thanks for hearing me out,

Max
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42928060/334926906/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTFmYTgzNS1mZGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OR9sVBBWui9iYWoThpSB1bmORWqZXTY7G_TnamKuHFU=)

Hello,
The United States reportedly offered to help President Zelensky evacuate from Ukraine. He declined, telling officials: "I need ammunition, not a ride."
But it’s not just President Zelensky. Across the entire country, everyday Ukrainians are standing up to fight against Russia’s unjustified and unprovoked aggression in whatever way they can. Even outsiders are coming to their aid.
Can you imagine Donald Trump – or almost any of his sycophants – doing anything remotely similar? They waged war on democracy and stretched the bounds of decency for four years. And they are still at it.
**My opponent Chuck Grassley can’t even muster the courage to stand up to ‘President Bone Spurs.’ I doubt he’d be out there stopping Russian tanks.**
When I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. You can be sure I will defend our democracy against its enemies... both foreign and domestic. The defense of our democracy is my job #1.
The polls show we can win. Chuck Grassley’s approval rating is the lowest it’s ever been. But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me and try to turn the Senate red. The only way to fight back is with help from grassroots donors like you.
**We need to raise another $250,000 before our critical mid-month deadline, and right now we’re still falling short. I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I have nowhere else to turn:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42931494/334946989/-42398318?refcode=em20220313pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjczOWM2NS0yMWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kv5kLD3TSt23WvskeNfveQYP86p1roNGwbDJVnzKivg=)

name: Research @ Hern for Congress
subject: Biden is failing America
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Congressman Kevin Hern wants to know what you think of Joe Biden’s performance in the White House. Read more >>>
| | | [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2b11d7a357047219/4749ba25d9c53242c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, President Biden’s approval rating continues to be dismal, and it’s no wonder why. It’s hard to choose a single disaster that has come out of his administration to pinpoint as the worst. We’ve lost our energy independence and gas just hit a nationwide average of $4 a gallon — the highest since 2008. Biden completely botched the Afghanistan withdrawal, and the western world is on the brink of war with Russia in large part because of his weak leadership. His Build Back Better plan was a total failure, and inflation is at record highs. That’s just the tip of the iceberg! **Congressman Hern wants to know what you think. How would you rate Joe Biden’s performance as president so far? Please take our quick poll to record your answer:**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2b11d7a357047219/3be555b0a8727dc3c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
[**RATE PRESIDENT BIDEN’S PERFORMANCE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2b11d7a357047219/ec3814a1e62872fcc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
If you’re as disgusted as we are by Biden’s terrible policies across the board, please chip in what you can right now. We need to make sure we keep Oklahoma RED this November, so we can flip the House, and block every bad idea coming out of Biden’s White House.
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2b11d7a357047219/30f7128850680e49c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

It is critical that we elect a new conservative majority to rein in Biden until we can make him a one-term president in 2024. [**Please help by rushing a donation today**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2b11d7a357047219/f6e0858574021014c3d6b838967d376c/34143). Thanks for your help,
Research @ Hern for Congress

**Peter, the GOP has chosen their next target in their cultural war against LGBTQ+ rights: children.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42928737/334930223/304068380?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk402-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTY2NjY5MS0wMGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GZVYUqlQgot2InjwbbEIHtRrQFnfwSHV0JcuFmVwOpQ=&emci=ed8aaa21-33a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8a666691-00a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)
In Florida, the state Senate passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, a measure that will prohibit Florida teachers from discussing topics involving sexual orientation or gender identity in the classroom. **Nine other states are considering similar proposals.**

In Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott instructed the Texas Department of Family and Protective Services to investigate parents providing gender-affirming care to their children as child abuse. And, to make matters worse, the Texas Department of Health and Human Services removed LGBTQ+ resources from its suicide-prevention website – **despite the fact that LGBTQ+ youth are more than four times as likely to attempt suicide than their peers. **
These attacks on LGBTQ+ children are unacceptable and sickening. Government officials are supposed to fight for _everyone_ – but instead, these extremist officials are targeting the most vulnerable children in their communities for political gain.

**Earlier this week, I called on the U.S. Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into Gov. Abbott’s atrocious attacks on trans children, but the fight for LGBTQ+ rights is far from over. Peter, with an ever-increasing number of attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, I need to know where you stand. So please, let me know ASAP: **
| | **Do you believe LGBTQ+ rights should be protected?**

Things are heating up in my race, so I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so important right now.

The end of this month marks our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2022. After the deadline hits, we’re legally required to report how much we’ve raised and how many donors have given. Ryan Zinke will have to report his numbers too, which means our fundraising reports will be compared side-by-side for all to see.

**Despite federal watchdogs confirming that Zinke broke ethics rules while at the Department of Interior, establishment Republicans are still standing behind him. In fact, special interests are funneling _even more_ cash into his warchest. **

This is our chance to send a message that our grassroots campaign can go toe-to-toe with Zinke and his special interest allies. Unfortunately, we're nearing the halfway point of March, but we aren’t yet halfway to our monthly fundraising goal. If we can’t ramp up quickly, we may fall short:

[**Can you make a donation of $3 before our deadline comes to a close? To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Fellow American,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_

name: Rescue Plan Point 4
subject: BUILD TRUMP’S WALL!
body:
Peter,
**Countries have borders.**

_But for too long, Democrats have left the door to America open for _anyone _to come in - even criminals._

**Under President Trump, we FINALLY had a leader who wasn’t afraid to keep America safe and take on illegal immigration - but now, the woke Biden Administration wants to DESTROY his southern border wall.**

**Rick Scott put together an 11-point plan to rescue America, and a critical part of that plan is to BUILD THE WALL and name it after President Trump.**

We want to honor President Trump for all he did to keep our country safe, but we want YOUR opinion.

name: Lauren Underwood
subject: Reflecting on 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6919?t=6&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k) Hi folks --

As I reflect on this past year, I'm filled with gratitude for this team, for the progress we made together, and for your support which made it all possible.

Our Democratic majorities have been working hard to make progress for the American people -- from passing the American Rescue Plan providing critical COVID-19 relief and increasing unemployment benefits, to accelerating our path to a clean energy future and expanding broadband access through the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act._

In December, the first piece of legislation from our Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act was signed into law, the _Protecting Moms Who Serve Act_. And I'm incredibly proud that the House unanimously passed the Maternal Vaccination Act to protect moms and babies against vaccine-preventable diseases and save lives.

Even in the face of unprecedented challenges, we made some incredible progress over the last year -- **progress that wouldn 't have been possible without your support.**

Now I won't sugarcoat it, we still have a lot of work ahead of us in the weeks and months ahead.

As a registered nurse, so many of the fights ahead are deeply personal to me -- from increasing vaccinations to stop the spread of COVID-19, to reforming a deeply unequal health care system, to passing legislation that will save the lives of moms across the country. I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work -- **but I can 't do it without you.**

In 2020, I won my race by just 5,374 votes -- _less than 1.5 percent_ -- and we're in for another close race this year. Our campaign will rely on support from this grassroots team this year more than ever to keep up our organizing and outreach efforts, keep making progress for our communities, and win the expensive midterm election ahead of us.

[**That 's why I'm humbly asking you to split a donation between Voter Protection Project and our campaign for Congress. We have our work cut out for us in the weeks and months ahead, but together, I know anything is possible.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6919?t=7&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6920?t=8&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6921?t=9&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6922?t=10&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6923?t=11&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6919?t=12&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k)
Thanks for everything. I couldn't be more honored to have you a part of this team.

Warmly,

-- Lauren
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1490%2E878179%2ED32M0k)

# Celebrate 🍀 St. Patrick's Day 🍀 with us, Peter Willis!
Melanie comes from a proud Irish family, and St. Patrick’s Day is one of her favorite holidays. One of the best ways to learn about other cultures is through their food, and breaking bread together builds community. You’re invited to do both (virtually) with us!
**WHAT** : St. Patrick’s Day Celebration. Watch Melanie make her famous Irish Guinness Beef Stew — and take home a memorable recipe!
**WHEN** : Wednesday, March 16th, 6 pm ET
**WHERE** : Zoom. March is a big month for us, Peter. It's an end-of-quarter month, and one of the four times a year we are required by law to publicly report how much money we've raised.
When those fundraising numbers go public, reporters and special interests will dive into the data to try and spot any weaknesses in our progressive movement. We really can't afford to come up short — not with so much on the line in this midterm election year.
Here's where you come in: **We're hoping to raise $20,000 by midnight on Tuesday to keep pace with our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, so we can sustain our work to secure critical pieces of our progressive agenda, protect our Democratic majority, and elect more progressives.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update March 13, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c276680b6aec/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8859849?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_“We are Americans first, Americans last, Americans always. Let us argue our differences. But remember we are not enemies, but comrades in a war against a real enemy, and take courage from the knowledge that our military superiority is matched only by the superiority of our ideals, and our unconquerable love for them.”_ _– John McCain_
|
---
## Heated Debate About Government Overreach and Vaccine Mandate
| | | | | | This past Wednesday in the Senate chamber, I stood up and proudly spoke in support of [**House Bill 1509**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=76088b9f0e&e=698f056321), which prohibits discrimination based on Covid vaccination status. Ingalls, our state’s largest employer, and its employees, were unnecessarily affected by the overreach from the Biden administration. As I told my colleagues, my family and I are vaccinated, we made that choice, but we have to understand that more government is not always the answer. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8992ef18c9&e=698f056321) to watch the Senate session from Wednesday. You can hear my remarks at the 5:29:39 minute mark.|
---
|
---
## Rising Gas Prices and Biden’s Failed Administration
| | | | | |
---
| Gas prices officially hit an all-time high this past Thursday. Combine this with rising inflation and D.C. continues to ignore the issues of us everyday Americans. As Congressman, I will put together the best team to take immediate action to address these “pocket book issues.”Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=5a3622c205&e=698f056321) to read the full article from the Sun Herald about Mississippi shattering the gas price record.|
---
## Tuesday was International Women’s Day
| | | | | | This past Tuesday was International Women’s Day! I posted this picture of my family on social media to give a shout out to these lovely ladies that I am blessed to call my family. I don't know where I would be without them and am thankful for their guidance on this journey to be your Congressman. There are many fantastic women helping out with our campaign and I am grateful for their tireless efforts.|
---
|
---
## Meeting with Friends from Children’s Advocacy Centers
| | | | | |
---
| As a prosecutor, I put sex offenders in jail. I have fought to protect children and even authored and passed the “Lonnie Smith Act” which strengthened Mississippi’s child abuse laws and “Katie’s Law” allowing for DNA collection after violent felony arrests. Children's Advocacy Centers of Mississippi conducted many of the forensic interviews I have used in my prosecutions. I am grateful for their dedication to protecting and providing healing and prosecution services to abused and neglected children. I will continue to bring this same advocacy for our children to D.C. if elected to be your Congressman.|
---
## First Responders Bill Passage
| | | | | | I am proud to be Senate Chairman of the First Responders Caucus, which was formed this year to increase dialogue between members of the legislature to address the most pressing first responder issues. This legislation is exactly the type of good we can do for those who make sacrifices for us every day. [**House Bill 779**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=efbc12df18&e=698f056321)ensures that death benefits are provided to families of first responders who pass away due to contracting COVID-19 in the line of duty. It was passed unanimously by the House and the Senate, and on Friday Governor Tate Reeves announced his signing of this bill. As Congressman, first responders will always come first for me.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=988ac8a6c5&e=698f056321) to read the WLBT article for more details.|
---
|
---
## Met With Miss George County Hospitality
| | | | | |
---
| It was a cold Saturday, but worth it! As always, Good Ole Days Festival in Lucedale was a blast. The highlight was meeting Miss George County Hospitality! America speaks through George Countians!|
---
## Crawfish Boil with South MS Homebuilders
| | | | | | It was great being with my longtime friends on Friday, the Coast Chapter of the Mississippi Home Builders Association. I appreciate all they do for the economy of our state.|
---
|
---
## Attended Grace’s Distinguished Young Women’s Program
| | | | | |
---
| It was a great reason for the whole family to be back together, to celebrate our wonderful daughter Grace being a Distinguished Young Woman! She is an essay winner and her singing was out of this world! Landon even made it in from Ole Miss to support his sister. What wonderful talent, poise and charisma by all ladies. |
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Continue work on teacher pay raise
* Continue work on tax cut
* Conference work begins out differences between House and Senate on legislation.

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

clean_body: We need to beat her | Fellow Conservative, Our last deadline before the end of the quarter is this Tuesday at midnight. | My team is working harder than ever to meet our fundraising goal. My opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has deep ties to the Radical Left’s dark money allies and is attempting to win back her seat in Congress by buying it. That’s the difference between her and me, she relies on billionaires to buy her seat, and I rely on hard-working everyday Americans. I know I can beat her, but if I don’t catch up in fundraising, she will blow me out of the water. Friend, I am humbly asking for your help. We made such a big impact when we elected Governor Glenn Youngkin, but this caused Radical Left politicians like Abigail Spanberger to turn to their party's deep pockets to maintain control of the House. - God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. name: John Lira
subject: I won’t give up on TX-23
body:
Hello, Peter, I’ve been hearing a lot of talk about how TX-23 is a Republican stronghold.

People have told me there’s no point in running as a Democrat because it can’t be done.

But I know how important this district and the people who live in it are. I know you deserve better than the unresponsive, out-of-touch leadership we see in Texas today.

Texas needs true representation — the kind that is ready to listen and prioritize the people and no one else.

Peter, will you make a donation today to help me get to Washington where I can do just that?

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220313?refcode=em20220313]

They’ve underestimated us and our fight so far, but meeting people on the ground has shown me that there is so much hope in TX-23 about the type of vision that I’m bringing to this race.

The level of fight people have on the ground is strong — Texans want to see small business support, voter protection rights, long-term immigration reform with a pathway to citizenship, access to quality, affordable health care, and more progressive policies like these.

It’s time for the country to see the value of TX-23 and together, we can use that power to secure another Democratic seat for Texas and for the rest of the country.

Most of all, it’s time to get someone in office who will finally prioritize the needs of working class Texans. Will you chip in to join the fight for progressive representation in one of the most critical races in the state and in the country?

Let’s get to work,
John Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.

# **🇺🇸 SIGN JUAN'S PETITION 🇺🇸

To qualify for the ballot this fall, candidates must collect signatures from registered voters who live in their district. We want to ensure we have a solid cushion to qualify for Arizona's new 6th congressional district, but we need __your__ help.**

**_These are due in just a few weeks!_**

**Show your support and add your name to Juan's petition ONLINE here: **[https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=1384135dbe&e=659fba240e)

For those who live in the new geography of the district, you will **not** be able to sign online but you can sign a paper petition! Reach out to us and we can coordinate a date/time to sign a paper petition.
CALL: 520-222-6874
EMAIL: [info@juanciscomani.com](mailto:info@juanciscomani.com?subject=petition&body=Hi!%20I'd%20like%20to%20sign%20Juan's%20petition.%20Can%20I%20meet%20you%20at%20the%20office%3F)

Please share with your family & friends who also live in the district. _**Unsure if you're in Juan's congressional district - AZ 06?**_ Use the address lookup site [HERE](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=36f95150ac&e=659fba240e).

[Unsubscribe](http://links.tedbudd.gop/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b09820e737c0401797cbb3be06345c3f&_s=d8893c2b75c84294afbac52e4fc2c1db&_t=dlnghENi4UTyUWzWrJVfuesKenBEZxGIOLgplTfMqCL9ZIgwIqd6dErQe69U3SujHhJRSkZrNLQ2M9qtAE2oX_AM24LeIvtdhhqsH2z9VvtAgNsnHCG_abeiTjlolDo90vHRAUCnipqoA5k9g1OW9Q9ckVFnKXTYtVljiO7u8pk%3D)
clean_body: Stop the Socialist Invasion | Folks, The Radical Left is outraising conservatives by historic amounts and if we do not pick up the pace, Democrats will surprise everyone and sweep the 2022 elections. We are counting on you to make sure this DOES NOT HAPPEN! | If we are unable to make up ground, Radical Socialist policies will entrench further in the United States. Do not sit on the sidelines and let it happen. With only 48 hours remaining to catch up to the Radical Left, we wanted to reach out to supporters we could count on. Can you imagine if our country loses even more freedom? We have seen glimpses of it so far under President Biden. Together, we will catch the Democrats and defeat the Socialist Agenda in 2022. GOP UPDATES Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

Peter,
Tomorrow, _Liberal Liz Cheney_ and _RINO Romney_ are holding their BIG WIG fundraiser in Northern Virginia.
While they mingle with their coastal elite allies and call YOU “crazy”, I will be here, fighting for you in beautiful Wyoming.

clean_body: | | | | Let’s make a statement | Peter, Tomorrow, Liberal Liz Cheney and RINO Romney are holding their BIG WIG fundraiser in Northern Virginia. While they mingle with their coastal elite allies and call YOU “crazy”, I will be here, fighting for you in beautiful Wyoming. In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government. And now, we are fighting back against big government bureaucrats who want to control our lands, our water and our lives, and dictate what we are allowed to think and say. That is why we need to TAKE A STAND. You’ve always been a top supporter, I hope you will continue forward on Team Hageman. Thank you, | | Harriet Hageman True-Republican Candidate Wyoming’s Lone Congressional Seat | | | |

Friend, we’re experiencing milestone after milestone. First, we were named one of the DCCC’s Red to Blue House races, making me one of the top-tier challenger candidates in the country. **Now, we just learned that we won over 80% of the vote for NM-02 at the New Mexico Democratic Party’s Pre-Primary Convention last weekend. That means we’re officially on the ballot in June!** Both of these victories are because of YOU. Growing up, I never in a million years thought I’d run for Congress, but when I made the decision to do so last year, I knew I would only do it by building a people-powered campaign centered on the needs of our communities. We are proving that the momentum to unseat extremist Republican Yvette Herrell from Congress is real, and it’s building. But it’s not just about replacing a bad politician: it’s about giving the people of NM-02 a truly good representative who will lead on critical issues like affordable healthcare, action on climate change, economic equality, and so much more. I am ready to be that leader for you, and with this victory, we’re one step closer to making that a reality. **Now, our sights are set on the June 7 primary election.** With less than three months until voters make their voices heard and choose the Democratic candidate to take on Herrell in November, we need to ramp up our efforts and kick it into high-gear. **[Can you contribute $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today to keep our campaign for NM-02 moving full-steam ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42932031/334948323/-280334095?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220313convention_gv_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDM2ZThiMi0yM2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gY7L4BvaRsM4bi1UsdaJ0CYiuNVXCI6qKrlppb1iaI=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friend, we’re experiencing milestone after milestone. First, we were named one of the DCCC’s Red to Blue House races, making me one of the top-tier challenger candidates in the country. Now, we just learned that we won over 80% of the vote for NM-02 at the New Mexico Democratic Party’s Pre-Primary Convention last weekend. That means we’re officially on the ballot in June! Both of these victories are because of YOU. Growing up, I never in a million years thought I’d run for Congress, but when I made the decision to do so last year, I knew I would only do it by building a people-powered campaign centered on the needs of our communities. We are proving that the momentum to unseat extremist Republican Yvette Herrell from Congress is real, and it’s building. But it’s not just about replacing a bad politician: it’s about giving the people of NM-02 a truly good representative who will lead on critical issues like affordable healthcare, action on climate change, economic equality, and so much more. I am ready to be that leader for you, and with this victory, we’re one step closer to making that a reality. Now, our sights are set on the June 7 primary election. With less than three months until voters make their voices heard and choose the Democratic candidate to take on Herrell in November, we need to ramp up our efforts and kick it into high-gear. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you again, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you’ve done to help achieve this. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Beto HQ
subject: This is a major but important expense for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We’re relying on grassroots contributions to run this campaign.
#
We have to be able to reach voters where they are and make sure Democrats, Republicans, Independents, and folks who have never voted before hear about our positive campaign for Texas.
That’s why we’re running digital ads to raise money, let voters know about Beto’s upcoming town hall events, and spread his unifying vision for Texas. **In the last week, our campaign spent $75,493 to run these digital ads across key online platforms.**
[ This is a major expense for our campaign, but it’s so important that we’re able to keep these ads up so thousands and thousands of additional Texans see them. Will you make a $3 donation right now to ensure we have the funds to continue to run our digital ads?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53973?refcode=ema20220313-180280&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=180280%2E444211%2ExIRIjU)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53973?refcode=ema20220313-180280&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=180280%2E444211%2ExIRIjU)**
The secret to winning in a state as big as Texas is to not write anyone off.
No county is too small, too Republican, or too anything for us to compete for their votes. We need the resources to fight back against the $50 million that Abbott has in the bank and to prepare for his next round of attack ads against Beto.
Beto has a positive vision for Texas. He’s focused on education, health care, jobs, and improving the daily lives of Texans across the state.
We need to keep our digital ads running to ensure that we’re able to bring in more supporters, get people out to our events, and share Beto’s positive vision through awareness ads. [Will you please pitch in $3 right now to help us keep our ads up?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53973?refcode=ema20220313-180280&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=180280%2E444211%2ExIRIjU)
Thank you so much,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220313-180280-footer&t=22&refcode2=180280_444211_xIRIjU&akid=180280%2E444211%2ExIRIjU)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
